issues.detail: Skill does not cover error handling or edge cases.
Skill is vendor-locked to Pascal Editor, not platform-agnostic.
Quick Start uses npx to download packages without checksum verification.

scenarios.name: Build a 10m x 8m ground floor with walls, door, windows
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses useScene().createNode for typed level/slab/wall/item nodes with parentId, 0.20 m exterior thickness in meters, and door/window items with sillHeight 0 and 0.9; baseline writes raw three.js/R3F geometry without the typed node hierarchy or Pascal stores.

scenarios.name: Register a custom wall-thickness validator
scenarios.rationale: Treatment calls registerSystem from @pascal-app/core with nodeTypes:['wall'], priority>50, and a process(dirtyNodes) that reads node.props.thickness/height; baseline writes a Zustand subscription that misses the dirty-node pipeline and priority ordering.
